data.title: Talking Stick Resort to Host Yrēfy Scottsdale Jazz Festival April 11
data.description: Spyro Gyra, the renowned jazz fusion band, is set to headline a festival in celebration of their 50th anniversary in SALT RIVER PIMA-MARICOPA INDIAN COMMUNITY, Arizona. The event will take place at Talking Stick Resort, owned by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community. The festivities are scheduled for April 3, 2026. This milestone concert will mark an important occasion for the band and is anticipated to draw in a large audience.

data.title: Data Breach Alert: Edelson Lechtzin LLP Investigates Hims & Hers, Inc. Data Breach
data.description: On April 3, 2026, a national class action law firm, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, announced its investigation into data privacy claims related to the Hims & Hers, Inc. data breach. The breach, discovered on February 5, 2026, impacted the computer network of Hims & Hers, Inc. The firm is currently looking into the breach to determine the extent of the data compromised and the potential impact on individuals involved.

data.title: Payward Names Robert Moore as Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Cheyenne, Wyoming - Payward has announced the immediate appointment of Robert Moore as the Chief Financial Officer. The decision was based on a unique approach to executive hiring, focusing on internal expertise rather than external candidates. By selecting Moore, who already has extensive knowledge of the company's financial background, Payward avoided the need for a costly and time-consuming search process. This unconventional strategy aims to leverage existing talent and minimize disruptions.

data.title: New Wan 2.7 video suite from Together AI available at $0.10 per second. Text-to-video live with image-to-video and editing tools on the way.
data.description: Alibaba has launched its advanced Wan 2.7 AI video model, which has integrated Together AI with text-to-video capabilities. The new feature is currently operational and offers competitive pricing. The platform plans to introduce image-to-video functionality and editing tools in the near future.

data.title: DRVN INVESTOR ALERT: Driven Brands (DRVN) Sued Following Accounting Errors, Internal Control Failures - Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 3, 2026, in San Francisco, national law firm Hagens Berman announced the filing of a securities class action lawsuit against Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) and its senior executives. Investors are encouraged to submit their losses related to DRVN.

data.title: SLNO INVESTOR ALERT: Soleno (SLNO) Sued After DCCR Launch Setback, Share Drop-- Hagens Berman
data.description: On April 3, 2026, in San Francisco, a securities class action lawsuit was initiated against Soleno Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLNO). The lawsuit aims to represent investors who bought Soleno common stock during the period from March 26, 2025, to November 4, 2025. The legal action comes in the wake of Soleno's...

data.title: DriveYo Launches AI Platform to Expose Hidden Car Deal Markups and Return $20 Billion to Consumers
data.description: In Newark, California, on April 3, 2026, DriveYo is revolutionizing the car purchasing process in the U.S. by confronting the notoriously obscured pricing tactics prevalent in the auto sector. With hidden profit margins and intricate financing schemes overshadowing the industry for years, DriveYo is determined to change the game.

data.title: Friskies Teams Up with Arizona Wildcats to Donate 1,000 Meals per Point Scored to Tucson Shelter Cats
data.description: In a significant win for the University of Arizona Wildcats, Friskies, the leading cat food brand, has decided to fully support the team during their first appearance in the national semifinals in 25 years. The Wildcats' journey through the basketball tournament has caught the attention of Friskies, as they aim to promote the team. This marks a noteworthy milestone for the Wildcats and showcases the strong partnership between the sports world and major brands like Friskies.

data.title: Local Greater Boston Plumber Surprised with Billboard Inside Fenway Park
data.description: Chelmsford, Massachusetts - On April 3, 2026, 128 Plumbing, Heating, Cooling, and Electric, a company with a 34-year history, highlighted its reputation as a leading residential service provider for heating, air conditioning, plumbing, electrical, and drain cleaning needs. As the 2026 Red Sox season begins, the company emphasizes its commitment to quality service in these areas.
